productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Grey Striped Shirt
description: Style NoteThis impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with formal trousers and leather shoes for that sharp, suave look.Product DetailsDark grey and white vertical striped shirt, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, curved hemline, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a patch pocket on the left chest with an internal concealed pocketMaterial and Care60% polyester and 40% cottonMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry low or dry in shadeUse warm ironSize and FitIndigo Nation's Edgy fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
